title: IARPA MICrONS program management and connectomics strategy
abstract: R. Jacob Vogelstein served as the IARPA program manager who conceived and led the Machine Intelligence from Cortical Networks (MICrONS) program, a ~$100M effort to reverse-engineer cortical circuits to advance AI. The program funded teams at Allen Institute, Princeton, and Baylor to generate the largest functional connectomics dataset to date.
notes: Not a traditional paper but critically important: RJ Vogelstein conceived and managed the MICrONS program at IARPA. Brother of Joshua Vogelstein.
